text:
. Born in Himeji City, Hyogo Prefecture. When he was a student at Osaka University, he joined the independent film production group "DAICON FILM". After completing DAICONFILM, he joined NTT in 1987. In 1991, he joined GAINAX. In 2010, he established Groundworks Co., ltd.. and assumed the position of CEO. In December 2019, he concurrently served as CEO of GAINAX. https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/convention/2020/anime-limited-cloud-matsuri-online/licensing-evangelion-yasuhiro-kamimiura/.160227 Also is the new Representative Director of GAINAX (As of February 2020). https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2020-02-21/yasuhiro-kamimura-becomes-new-representative-director-of-gainax/.156714 

Works

Theatrical Films

Evangelion: Death and Rebirth (1997) - 2D Digital Work
The End of Evangelion (1997) - 2D Digital Work
Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo (2012) - 2D Digital Work Assistance, Publicity Assistance (Groundworks)
Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time (2021) - Copyright Manager (Groundworks), Publicity (Groundworks)

TV Anime/OVA

Neon Genesis Evangelion (anime) (1995) - Key Animation (eps 14, 25)
His and Her Circumstances (1998) - Animation producer (eps 16-26)
FLCL (2000) - 2D Work
Re: Cutie Honey (2004) - 2D Work (ep 3)
Insufficient Direction (2014) - Planning
